evidence: If you are a fan of the Fairly Odd Parents TV Show or if you just want to see something funny, give this DVD a shot.
This is a great movie... It features Catwoman, Riddler, Joker, and The Penguin on one movie.
This DVD was just OK, it wasn't good, and it wasn't bad.
The plot isn't much, it is to save their parents.
The only reason why it got 4 stars instead of 5 stars is because it dragged on and on in a couple of places.
This movie is much better for the younger set of people.
The DVD however lacks special features that other DVD's have.
This is a very good DVD.
If you liked Toy Story or Toy Story 2, you MUST see this movie.
Goldeneye is a great Bond film and is a must buy just like most other 007 films.
It is an amazing movie that everyone should see.
I was very pleased with what I saw.
This is a great addition to a DVD collection.

summary: The user enjoys a mix of action and comedy films, often favoring family-friendly content. They have a moderate sensitivity to production quality and prefer straightforward narratives, though they appreciate films that evoke some emotional response.
